breaking_changes.title: Updating dependencies (laravel/framework ^12.0, phpunit ^11.0)
breaking_changes.description: Update laravel/framework to ^12.0, phpunit/phpunit to ^11.0, and pestphp/pest to ^3.0 in composer.json.

breaking_changes.title: HasUuids trait now returns UUIDv7
breaking_changes.description: The HasUuids trait now returns UUIDv7 (ordered UUIDs). To keep UUIDv4 behaviour, use HasVersion4Uuids trait instead. HasVersion7Uuids trait has been removed.

breaking_changes.title: Carbon 2 support removed, Carbon 3 required
breaking_changes.description: Support for Carbon 2.x has been removed. All Laravel 12 applications now require Carbon 3.x. Review DST handling and microsecond precision differences.

breaking_changes.title: Concurrency::run returns associative keys
breaking_changes.description: When invoking Concurrency::run with an associative array, results now include their associated keys instead of numeric indices.

breaking_changes.title: Container respects default property values
breaking_changes.description: The DI container now respects default values of class properties when resolving. Classes with nullable typed constructor params defaulting to null will now resolve to null instead of a concrete instance.

breaking_changes.title: Image validation rule now excludes SVGs
breaking_changes.description: The 'image' validation rule no longer allows SVG images by default. Use 'image:allow_svg' or File::image(allowSvg: true) to restore SVG support.

breaking_changes.title: Local filesystem disk default root changed to storage/app/private
breaking_changes.description: The local disk root now defaults to storage/app/private instead of storage/app. Define the local disk explicitly to restore previous behavior.

breaking_changes.title: Schema methods return all schemas by default
breaking_changes.description: Schema::getTables(), Schema::getViews(), Schema::getTypes() now return results from all schemas. Schema::getTableListing() returns schema-qualified names. Pass schema argument to filter.

breaking_changes.title: mergeIfMissing() supports dot notation for nested arrays
breaking_changes.description: Request::mergeIfMissing() now merges nested array data via dot notation instead of creating literal dot-notation keys.

breaking_changes.title: Route precedence unified for cached and uncached routing
breaking_changes.description: When multiple routes have the same name, uncached routing now matches the first registered route (matching cached behaviour) instead of the last.

breaking_changes.title: Database Grammar and Blueprint constructors require Connection
breaking_changes.description: Illuminate\Database\Grammar and Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint constructors now require a Connection instance. Grammar::setConnection() removed. Primarily affects custom database drivers.

breaking_changes.title: DatabaseTokenRepository $expires parameter now in seconds
breaking_changes.description: The constructor of DatabaseTokenRepository now expects the $expires parameter in seconds rather than minutes.
